shapes.name: Customer
shapes.description: Application end users with shipping and billing addresses.

shapes.name: Customer Addresses
shapes.description: Shipping and billing addresses belonging to a customer.

shapes.name: SalesOrder
shapes.description: Customer purchases. Total is denormalized from OrderItems for fast list views.

shapes.name: Sales_Order_Item
shapes.description: Line items on an order; a weak entity identified by its order plus a line sequence number.

baseline.name: Customer
baseline.description: Application end users with shipping and billing addresses.

baseline.name: Address
baseline.description: Shipping and billing addresses belonging to a customer.

baseline.name: SalesOrder
baseline.description: Customer purchases. Total is denormalized from OrderItems for fast list views.

baseline.name: Payment
baseline.description: Payment captured for an order (at most one per order).

baseline.name: OrderItem
baseline.description: Line items on an order; a weak entity identified by its order plus a line sequence number.

baseline.name: Product
baseline.description: Catalog products available for sale, each in one category.

baseline.name: Category
baseline.description: Product categories for organizing the catalog.
